programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Comienzan las vacaciones y en el primer día en la casa shore se reúnen los viejos y nuevos integrantes para comenzar unas vacaciones de locura. El regreso a la casa original parece tener efecto en sus habitantes y los nuevos romances.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Luego de una primera noche salvaje, los Shore deciden pasar una tarde tranquila en la playa en donde aprovechan para hablar de lo sucedido la noche anterior y conocerse mejor. Llega la noche, los tragos, la fiesta y comienza la competencia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Llega el nuevo "Boss" a la casa y los Shore descubren que sus obligaciones no son nada parecidas a lo que esperaban. Después de un día de trabajo nada mejor que unos drinks y lo que parecía una fiesta tranquila, termina en una noche de locura.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Luego del accidente de Fernando, Potro decide acompañarlo al hospital y las consecuencias de su caída no se hacen esperar. Una vez más llega el "Boss" a la casa para enviar a los Shore a un nuevo trabajo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Comienza un nuevo día en la casa Shore y la llegada del Boss emociona a casi todos los integrantes de las casa quienes salen a disfrutar de un nuevo y divertido día laboral. Al caer la noche los Shore deciden ir a un sitio más tranquilo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: After Captain is kicked out and the women get into a heated fight, the Shore gang vows to get Acapulco out of control like never before. A new guest surprises everybody in the house, cooling things off a little, but not for long.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: After Ramiro's violent reaction, the group tries to solve the problem with a Shore-like trial. Matryoshka plans to honor her friends and organizes an inclusive picnic where they open up.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: A special guest hits the wildest house in Acapulco looking for revenge and promises to heat things up. The welcome party involves a lot of fun, live music, drinks, and things getting out of control, as usual.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Acapulco never sleeps and surprises never end. Matheus joins the gang and changes the dynamics in the house. Women are crazy about the new housemate and will fight to win him over by setting free all their charms.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Matheus and Charlotte cheer things up in the port of Acapulco. The Boss surprises the gang with a live recital by Justin Quiles and things burst into a party. Nacha has a crush on Matheus and Diego is boiling with jealousy.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Matheus and Charlotte cheer things up in the port of Acapulco. The Boss surprises the gang with a live recital by Justin Quiles and things burst into a party.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky is kicked out of the house. Fernanda supports her and they leave the house together. Charlotte wants to raise awareness and tries to teach the gang rules of good behavior.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Vacation is coming to an end, but it doesn´t mean the fun is waning. After many tequila shots, Diego loses his temper and crosses the line. Everybody is sick of his behavior and confront him.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Vacation has begun and the gang gathers to meet the new family members. Alba confronts Diego and Karime and Chile decides to punish the thief of his lines.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Peace and harmony remain and the Boss visits the gang. Fernanda shows up, but ignores "Matryoshka". Carlos has five unforgettable minutes and Karime plans a romantic date that could go wrong.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Karime and Fernanda's date takes a sudden turn and the gang heads to a party. A visitor makes an impression and Jacky invites him to the house, but men feel uncomfortable and want to kick him out.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Rocío joins the gang and she is thirsty for revenge. Santiago and Alba surprise everyone with a polyamorous ceremony. Diego can't hold his drink and his hard partying affects him.

programme.title: Aliens Uncovered: UFOs Over Vegas
programme.desc: Seeking to determine if the UFOs seen in Arizona and Nevada are man-made or from other worlds.

programme.title: Aliens Uncovered: The Lost Race
programme.desc: A group of beings existed before mankind, hidden from modern society. Thorough investigations of art and ancient text reveal interactions between humans and a higher source of intelligence.

programme.title: Weird or What?
programme.desc: A California woman is plagued by an invisible attacker; a teen thinks she can see ghosts.

programme.title: Weird or What?
programme.desc: A skydiver survives a fall when her parachute fails; the possibility of spontaneous human combustion.

programme.title: Weird or What?

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Central Scotland has its very own Area 51, known as the Falkirk Triangle, encompassing the village of Bonnybridge, which claims the highest concentration of the region's UFO activity.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah study the evidence available for the mass UFO sighting over Phoenix, Ariz. in 1997.

programme.title: On the Trail of UFOs
programme.desc: In the 1960s the cattle mutilation phenomenon became a widespread concern across the American west..

programme.title: On the Trail of UFOs

programme.title: Mysteries & Monsters
programme.desc: Eli investigates government scrutiny of George Adamski who despite suppression attempts, stood by his photograph and film evidence, remaining a hotly debated figure in ufology.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: China is kicked out of a photo shoot with Vivica Fox after she gives the actress attitude. China retaliates in a career ending move. Kim styles Somaya Reece and hires a sexy new receptionist.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim styles actress/singer Somaya Reece. Naja and China fight over her failed shoot with Vivica Fox. Leah erupts when Anthony, Angela and Dontay wreak havoc in the salon after a liquid lunch.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim styles Michelle Williams for her latest album cover. Angela bails on the salon without notice to go to Thailand for a week. Kim and Leah fight over a photo-shoot for Kim's new shower cap and bonnet line.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar gets questioned about having a second baby and takes a lie detector test. Tamar worries about promoting her single while busy with her talk show and fashion line. Vince is ready to bring Miracle home.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar, Vince, and friends, including reality stars Benzino and Althea, go on a mountain retreat, while Toni watches baby Logan. Things get wild during a competitive fishing trip. Vince pushes Tamar for the second baby.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince

programme.title: Mary Mary

programme.title: Mary Mary

programme.title: Mary Mary

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: El plan de Aurora lleva a su límite a Lorenzo. Él está a punto de perder la razón con sus provocaciones, entre tanto, ella parece cerrar una apuesta inconclusa con el padre y con el hijo. Aurora gana la audición para interpretar la bella durmiente.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Blanca le dice a Lorenzo que es su papá y que no viaje, pues soñó que el avión se accidentaba. Después visita a Martín y le hace otra revelación. Aurora va a la academia de Lorenzo y empieza a bailar, pero se desmaya.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Gregorio obliga a Camila a irse de Fresno, ya que cree que ha regresado para vengarse, pero no quiere irse y le hace saber que hará lo imposible por quedarse como la dueña de “El Talismán.”

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Jim Smith ofrece el trabajo en “El Talismán” a Camila y ella no tiene otra opción que tomarlo debido a sus problemas económicos. Lucrecia se entera de esto y que Camila no conoció a Mariana.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Antonio se plantea eliminar a Gregorio para quedar al mando de “El Alcatraz” y recurre a la ayuda de Elvira, quien colocará una cantidad de veneno en la medicina, para que Gregorio no muera.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Antonio suplica a su padre que no se lleve los carros que les regaló a sus hijas. Luego Gregorio le pide a Valentín que vigile a Antonio para que no descubra que falsificó el testamento de su madre.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer intenta atacar a Humberto, Pedro evita que le hagan daño. Ignacio le reclama al Chamoy por no terminar el trabajo. Yesenia está de acuerdo con la boda de Inés. Elmer le pregunta al abogado Martín que hizo con el otro bebé.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer amenaza al abogado Martín con hablar sobre su negocio de tráfico de niños, le exige saber dónde está su hijo. Pedro sospecha que el Chamoy fue quien los atacó. Leonardo le pregunta a Sara si hubo algún problema cuando él nació.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer le insinúa a Inés que el bebé que perdieron podría no haber muerto. Ella le cuenta a Jonathan lo que pasó durante el parto de los gemelos. Nora y Humberto discuten si deben decirle a Leonardo la verdad sobre su nacimiento.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le dice a Basilio que Humberto esconde algo sobre él y Leonardo, se encuentra con Elmer. El Chamoy amenaza a Ignacio con una pistola y le dice que le dé información sobre Leonardo. Inés le confiesa a Paloma que tiene miedo.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora lleva a Lorenzo a su alcoba y se viste como hace veinte años. Ella planea finalmente separarlo de Natalia y, para ello, usará un juego seductor pero peligroso. A Martín se le cierran las puertas de todas las clínicas donde pide trabajo.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes her favorite salmon tacos with super-food slaw and avocado crema, with lemon-lime ice for dessert.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia shares her recipe for spaghetti with turkey-pesto meatballs and garlic bread, with an easy green salad.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork producers have worked so hard to remove fat from their pigs that most pork roasts have little character. Glazing a pork roast with maple syrup is an attractive way to boost flavor and we wanted to perfect this recipe.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Truckers often know where to find the best home-style cooking. And what could be better than chicken-fried steak with cream gravy and real coconut cream pie?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although chicken dinners are quick to prepare, they can go terribly wrong. Part of the problem is the chicken itself—the breast meat has little fat and becomes dry and chalky if overcooked. The other major source of trouble is improper cooking methods.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: French country cooking has a way with chicken in a pot, whether it's the famous chicken with 40 cloves of garlic or the lesser-known chicken Provençal. These dishes take chicken to new heights—or go awry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Purchase a good steak and cook it properly, and all it needs is salt and pepper—and, of course, a side of spuds. We wanted potatoes with perfect texture and big flavor—something unusual to accompany a great steak and a good bottle of wine.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Restaurant steak tips are often tough and weirdly seasoned, and thick steak fries can be pale and soggy. The test kitchen felt confident that we could rescue these dishes and turn them into something you would welcome into your home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to prepare two satisfying stir-fries: beef with broccoli and pork with eggplant and onions.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to make Pad Thai and Sesame Noodles with Shredded Chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Here we demonstrate how to make three Italian classics: Grilled Chicken ala Diavola, Frico, and Strawberries with Balsamic Vinegar.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Preparing favorite French dishes such as cassoulet or tarte Tatin calls for a lot of patience and time. We wondered if we could find ways to simplify these recipes without sacrificing the qualities that make them classics.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In the test kitchen, we think afternoon (or morning) tea is an excellent excuse to whip up a batch of scones or a golden loaf of lemon pound cake. Making these baked goods at home certainly yields better results than what you can buy. We'll show you how.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some days you don't mind spending the morning preparing eggs or baking muffins. But rubbery omelets and dry, hockey puck muffins can make you wonder why you bothered. These brunch recipes are special enough to make you long for Sunday mornings.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Few recipes deliver so much pleasure for so little work as pancakes. The batter comes together in minutes, and the cooking time is brief. Why, then, do most Americans never make pancakes from scratch?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although easy to prepare, most cookie recipes are notoriously fickle. A minor ingredient change or fluctuation in oven temperature can yield unexpected results. Our goal was simple: Take two favorite cookies and develop reliable recipes that taste great.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen decided to tackle two popular sheet cakes—carrot and chocolate—and produce simple recipes that would deliver superior results.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although some would never dare to adulterate plain cheesecake, variations abound—some good, some bad, some ugly. We wanted our cheesecake to be both light and creamy, with great lemon flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When entertaining, we like desserts that look more complicated to prepare than they really are. A chocolate mousse cake or chilled lemon soufflé requires basic ingredients but is sure to elicit the proper oohs and aahs from guests.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We like appetizers that deliver big flavor without much work. This means spiced nuts that are not overly sweet, spinach dip that is bold and creamy (not watery and insipid), and beef satay that is tender and vibrant.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most cooks are under the impression that good soup takes all day to prepare. We'll show you how to make simplified versions of two favorite soups: chicken noodle and Italian pasta and bean.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Soup for supper is an appealing concept, especially on a cold night. But for soup to work as a main course, it better be hearty. Our vibrant lentil soup fits the bill, and we round out this meal with quick cheese bread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some local dishes become so popular that they transcend their region. Gumbo is a taste of Louisiana in a big old bowl. And Cincinnati chili is American original, served with buttered spaghetti, kidney beans, cheddar cheese, and chopped onions.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: It sometimes seems the simplest recipes suffer the worst fate in modern cookbooks. The test kitchen was committed to breathing new life into these old-fashioned American recipes: stuffed pork chops, gravy, and glazed carrots.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We offer two inspired takes on roast chicken. Our roast lemon chicken ends with a twist. And there's nothing conventional about cooking a butterflied chicken under a brick. But these two recipes both deliver crisp skin and lots of flavors.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Quick and easy weeknight cooking can still yield great results. We start with two quick-cooking classics— sautéed chicken cutlets and pan-seared shrimp—and elevate them from the everyday.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we offer delicious, relatively straightforward fare that appeals to young and old. What kid—or adult—doesn't look forward to macaroni and cheese or barbecued chicken?

programme.desc: Charlie Kirk, the founder and president of Turning Point USA, talks current events, the principles of free markets and limited government.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: At San Quentin, every inmate is marked with a security level based on his crime and prison behavior; serving as a reception center, the overpopulated prison must house a dangerous mix of levels within close proximity of one another.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An inmate takes drastic action and leaves his cell in a bloody mess; dangerous contraband is found on another inmate at Florida's Santa Rosa Correctional Institution.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A new arrival to the Santa Rosa Correctional Institution raises serious concerns throughout the maximum-security prison; young correctional officer cadets experience the burn as each one takes a pepper spray shot in the eye.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A massive search for contraband throughout the facility turns up the heat on two inmates inside the Santa Rosa Correctional Institution; a convict prompts an evacuation when he floods his housing unit.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The prison takes on a military style feel for both the inmates and the officers; a gang unit investigation turns up the heat on a pair of cellmates, before one of them turns on the other.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A cell search inside the maximum-security prison results in some heated words and the discovery of a gang manifesto; inmates express their personal feelings in private to the cameras; one confronts his own mortality.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inside Florida's toughest maximum-security prison a convicted murderer breaks down the ways of prison, while a young, fresh-faced inmate learns about them; another inmate mails a death threat to the White House and then carries out a shocking act.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inside San Quentin, gangs, drugs and sheer boredom make up a violent mix; Scanvinski Hymes has been in prison since he was 18 years old; almost 20 years later, he's racked up the highest number of violent offenses in California prison history.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: San Quentin has one of the longest histories of violence; whether it's an inmate fresh off the street, a gang dropout in protective custody, or an officer trying to maintain order, they've all fallen victim to violent attacks.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The muonna makes Inuyasha reveal the location of his father's grave.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome is able to pull out the Tetsusaiga. Sesshomaru tries to kill her, and Inuyasha is angered and fights to protect Kagome.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Nobunaga tries to save the lord of the castle who is possessed by a toad demon.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: After announcing her intention to marry Raven, Celi's past and her connection to Raven and Stoffel is revealed, while Yuri and the others are invited to a celebration.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: The castle's guest house has been taken over by monsters, so Yuri, who wants to get a night of peace away from Wolfram, resolves to clear it of the unwanted guests.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Deciding he wants to see a dragon, Yuri sets out with Wolfram, Conrad, and Günter travel to a preserve where they discover dragon poachers, and one of them challenges Yuri to a fight.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: After his defeat in battle, the poacher reveals his name to be Alford, who explains his motivation to fight Yuri while the group makes plans to protect the dragons.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day two for dynamic duo Thomas Plant and Paul Laidlaw sees them attempt to outwit each other on their way from Bolsover to the auction in Stamford.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's charm versus mathematical prowess, as experts Thomas Plant and Paul Laidlaw hit the shops between Huntingdon and Towcester.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Paul Laidlaw's negotiating tactics are tested to the limit as they travel from Olney to the auction in Watlington.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Paul Laidlaw spend their final day of antique adventuring heading from Tetsworth to the final auction showdown in Pewsey.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a new chapter as we hit the road with seasoned auctioneers James Braxton and Jonathan Pratt as they travel from Altrincham to Nantwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Jonathan Pratt search for bargains while traveling from Leek in Staffordshire to Birmingham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Jonathan Pratt are determined to up their game as they head from Stratford upon Avon to the auction in Frome, Somerset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day four of James Braxton and Jonathan Pratt's road trip as they scour local antique shops between Wells and the auction in Crewkerne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Jonathan Pratt's fifth leg takes them from Crewkerne in Somerset to Lostwithiel in Cornwall for their final auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a brand-new week, hitting the road with David Barby and David Harper as they travel all the way from Moy to Omagh in Northern Ireland.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Barby and David Harper grapple with Euros as they travel from Athlone to Kells in Ireland.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Barby and David Harper have crossed the North Sea to Wales--and now the competition heats up as they travel from Prestatyn to Criccieth.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Barby's after something quirky, while David Harper's going for the killer deal as they shop from Aberystwyth to the auction in Shrewsbury.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The conclusion of David Barby and David Harper's epic tour begins in Hereford--but who will be crowned king at the auction in Llanelli?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Audley End near Saffron Walden in Essex.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Audley End in Essex.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Hanbury Hall in Worcestershire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team head to Cheshire for a day of valuations at Arley Hall and Gardens.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A return visit to the gardens of Arley Hall in Cheshire with Fiona Bruce and the experts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A return visit to Broughton Castle uncovers two very large portraits depicting servants.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A visit to Baddesley Clinton uncovers a gruesome box containing a wooden peg.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A visit to Baddesley Clinton sees the team uncover an exceptionally rare silver box.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow boards the Flying Scotsman for a special edition.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In a special edition, Fiona Bruce looks at the most talked about finds of the year.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the Antiques Roadshow team make a return visit to Tewkesbury Abbey.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: With an abundance of sunlight and rainfall, plants dominate in African rainforests.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Wildlife in and around Africa's waterways.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The riches of the Caribbean and the processes that shape them.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: An exploration of the stunning underwater treasures of the Caribbean Sea, including the world's second largest barrier reef and countless shipwrecks.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The survival stories of the islands' wildlife residents following the Caribbean hurricane season.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The wild shore of Central America is the Caribbean's more mysterious side, with beautiful archipelagos of hundreds of islands and wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: The central island of Honshu is home to over 100 million people, but is also home to an astonishing range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: In the far south of Japan, there is a a place where all life is influenced by the power of the sea, and where volcanoes and typhoons are forces to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: Japan's northernmost island, Hokkaido is a place totally unlike the rest of the country. Every year it swings from a bitter Siberian winter into the warmth of a Mediterranean-like summer.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Isolated and unstable mountains test the survival skills of wildlife in Africa.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Savannahs are dynamic, energy-rich worlds of grasses and trees.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Animals and plants find ingenious ways to survive in the desert.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: The rare and beautiful wildlife along the coasts of Africa.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: With an abundance of sunlight and rainfall, plants dominate in African rainforests.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella starts with her take on a light and sunny yogurt pot cake; she recruits her niece and nephew to make a shortcut sausage meatball supper; Nigella prepares squid and prawns with marjoram and chili; a tiramisini ends the evening.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Lamb chops with mint; chilli and golden potatoes; ruby red plum and amoretti crumble; farro risotto with mushrooms.

programme.title: Rachel Allen: All Things Sweet
programme.desc: Rachel Allen indulges in chocolate treats, including chocolate and hazelnut praline ice cream.

programme.title: Rachel Allen: All Things Sweet
programme.desc: Rachel creates date and stem ginger pudding.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Cake Diaries
programme.desc: Rachel prepares hazelnut meringue cake, Irish coffee cups and a Swedish apple cake.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Cake Diaries
programme.desc: Rachel has recipes for people who want to spoil themselves a little, including carrot cake, plus banana, almond and honey muffins.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Cake Diaries
programme.desc: Rachel bakes a classic Victoria sponge cake, shows how to make the perfect chocolate fudge cake and adds peach and saffron to the classic upside down cake.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Cake Diaries
programme.desc: Rachel bakes a classic Victoria sponge cake, shows how to make the perfect chocolate fudge cake and adds peach and saffron to the classic upside down cake.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Everyday Kitchen
programme.desc: Rachel re-invents the timeless classic roast chicken; a delicious iced strawberry meringue cake; kitchen hints and tips.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Everyday Kitchen
programme.desc: Rachel makes a slow cooked, melt-in-the-mouth lamb dish; behind the scenes of a food show.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Everyday Kitchen
programme.desc: Rachel understands the importance of family dinners, and whips up some old family favorites to get everyone gathered around the dinner table.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc creates four mouth-watering chocolate recipes: a simple mousse, rich chocolate delice, fondant with a melting middle, and his signature dessert: cafe creme, which is a chocolate-sculpted cup filled with a mousse and coffee sabayon.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc celebrates the season with a winter vegetable salad featuring beetroots, a celeriac puree served with a crisp-skinned roast wild duck with blackberry sauce and watercress soup.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc uses two seasonal ingredients, game and mushrooms, to create a French version of a pasty called pithivier, which is filled with a rich mix of pheasant, chestnuts and dried fruits; he also makes a cep mushroom tortellini with fresh pasta.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: The miracle of yeast helps Raymond to create a French classic: brioche; he gets down to basics with a French country bread recipe that's essential for any baker to add to their repertoire; lastly, he makes a spectacular apple croustade.

programme.desc: Marcia le cuenta de su embarazo a Belinda, ella entra en cólera y le dice a su padre que ese niño no puede nacer. Jorge también se entera, quiere confirmarlo y todos se preocupan por él.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: José María le dice a Valeria que la va a desheredar, ella le responde a su estilo. Elvira y Valeria finalmente se encuentran. Alejandro le cuenta la verdad a su hermana y ella rompe con Mauro.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Belinda habla con José María y le cuenta el plan de Marcia, él toma medidas para defender sus intereses. Valeria llama a su padre y lo cita, ya tiene lista su sorpresa. Pablo habla bien claro.

programme.title: La impostora
programme.desc: El padre Camilo sigue con vida, pero aún está secuestrado. Rafael llama a Raquel, le advierte que Eduardo está buscando al padre Camilo, y le pide que lo deje libre.

programme.title: La impostora
programme.desc: Eduardo ya no quiere que Victoria haga negocios con Adriano. Cristóbal despechado visita a Mariana y le dice que lo único que quiere es estar con ella. Adriano le cuenta a Blanca que Raquel lo chantajea para que sean socios.

programme.title: La impostora
programme.desc: Mariana y Cristóbal se convierten en amantes. Raquel da la noticia de la asociación entre Adriano y los San Marino. A Eduardo no le gusta para nada la noticia y decide retirarse de la reunión. Visita a Blanca y le propone que se vayan lejos.

programme.title: La impostora
programme.desc: Eduardo decide renunciar a la naviera. El padre Camilo y Luciana sufren un accidente automovilístico. Cristóbal le pide a Mariana que se quede con él. Socorro trata de proteger a Blanca de Raquel, y le entrega otra foto a Jorge para confundirlo.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to motivate the inattentive owner of a failing Portland, Oregon, music venue plagued by mismanagement and an ant infestation.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get a lenient bar owner to reign in his raucous over-pouring bartenders if he is going to save a dated Burbank, CA, sports bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The timid owner of City Bistro in St. Louis, MO, looks the other way as her raunchy bartenders flash customers to drum up business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: At an Ann Arbor, MI, college alumni bar, Jon is forced to deal with a hotheaded owner whose fiery temper keeps his staff on edge and his million-dollar debt on ice.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must correct the behavior of a drunk and verbally abusive owner if he's going to save the historic Gipsy, Las Vegas's first gay nightclub.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After a near-fatal heart attack, Artie, the owner of Alibi in Las Vegas, lost his zeal for the work, and it's up to Jon to help him get it back.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must restore trust between owners and curb rampant theft among employees to save Barlow's, a failing Georgia sports bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A juvenile name and bad reputation threaten the Fort Bragg-adjacent bar Cliques, and Jon will have to put the staff through bar boot camp to save it.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Faced with a PDA-obsessed manager and an owner solely focused on his own retirement, the staff at Pat's Cocktails calls Jon for help.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon has a hard time getting through to the owner of the Black Light District, who's convinced fixing up his rancid dive would be a betrayal of his punk rock credo.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to fix the negligent behavior at Harbor Point Club & Grill in Richardson, Texas, where owners drink the profits away, and the staff struggles to get one order right.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must go to war with the rowdy regulars of a Southern California dive bar once a popular haven for smokers until forced to comply with the law.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to save The Sandbar in Albuquerque, New Mexico, but before he can save the failing beach-themed bar, he has to figure out who the actual owner is first.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to middle-of-nowhere Tennessee to rescue The Wanted Saloon, whose remote location is just the first of many challenges.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch has to work a 24-hour shift with Stephanie and entrusts Hobie with the responsibility of taking care of himself during that time. But Hobie becomes infatuated with an older girl and is pressured into throwing a party without Mitch’s knowledge.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Carter McKay has recently moved to Southern California to live with his father after his mother's death. When Hobie invites him to the annual father/son lifeguard competition Hobie learns the reason Carter is so embarrassed by his father.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a woman Mitch refers to as “The Mermaid” turns out to be the wife of a crime boss, an FBI agent comes to catch him before he can escape the country. Things become complicated when Mitch and the catty FBI Agent butt heads.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The beach descends into chaos when DJ Larry "Loomin" Large announces a beach wide treasure hunt for a gold pirate doubloon worth $100,000. The Baywatch team is put on high alert when thousands of reckless treasure hunters storm the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When the hot Santa Ana winds move in from the desert, things start heating up on the Baywatch beach in more ways than one, as it seems like all the “weirdos” in the world have been blown to the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Tracy, a lifeguard-turned-hovercraft expert, arrives at Baywatch to demonstrate the benefits of the new rescue vehicle. Meanwhile, The National Pro Beach Volleyball Tour arrives, reigniting Matt's desire to be a professional beach volleyball star.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt and Hobie rescue a young boy who is being harassed by a thug and take care of him until they can get him to his mother, but he seems to be hiding a deep dark secret. Meanwhile, CJ falls for a handsome young man who turns out to be taboo.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Joey joins Mitch and Hobie in decorating for Christmas. CJ has a great time working with Father Ryan but starts to worry that he may misinterpret her warmth as flirting, and that he may be considering quitting the priesthood for her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan's visa is soon to expire, and he will be sent back to Australia unless he gets a green card. He plans on earning the money to purchase one in an upcoming boat race. Meanwhile Mitch’s mother visits.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie is kidnapped by an eco-terrorist. The Baywatch team must stop the terrorist before she blows up an oil rig with Stephanie constrained inside it!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch proposes to Tracy, but the happy moment is short-lived as she reveals she has a terminal illness. With the team being short-staffed it is up to Logan and Caroline to deal with reckless wave runners.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch is still mourning Tracy’s death, so Hobie seeks help from a radio show to help Mitch recover. Caroline resuscitates a man with AIDS, which puts a strain on her relationship with Logan. And CJ enters a ballroom dancing competition.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch receives a mysterious package his father had put together before he died. Mitch and his father never saw eye-to-eye, but this gift impacts Mitch more than he ever thought possible. Logan visits a hypnotist to deal with a past trauma.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Andy, an old friend of Mitch, visits Baywatch to complete four days of lifeguard service in order to remain on the active roster. But Andy's strong-arm tactics do not sit well with the other lifeguards.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville, Oklahoma as Ben Askren defends his Welterweight belt against Season 7 tournament winner Karl Amoussou. Plus the Bellator MMA debut of King Mo fighting in his home state.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Atlantic City, NJ with the Featherweight Championship belt on the line! Champion Pat Curran defends his title against Season 8 Featherweight tournament winner Shahbulat Shamhalaev.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Rio Rancho, NM. Welterweight Champion Ben Askren takes on Welterweight season 8 tournament winner Andrey Koreskov. Then Michael Chandler defends his Lightweight belt against the Lightweight season 8 tournament winner David Rickels.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Michael Chandler once again goes up against Eddie Alvarez in a rematch for the Lightweight title. Also, Pat Curran defends his Featherweight belt against Daniel Straus and King Mo takes on Emanuel Newton for the Light Heavyweight title.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Atlantic City, NJ. The Heavyweight belt is on the line as champion Alexander Volkov takes on Vitaly Minakov. Then in the main in the event Quinton 'Rampage' Jackson makes his Bellator MMA debut against Joey Beltran.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in Hammond, Indiana with the Featherweight World Title on the line as Champ Daniel Straus and former Champ Pat Curran meet for a third time to decide who walks away with the title.

programme.title: Bellator 123: Curran vs Pitbull 2
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Mohegan Sun as Pat Curran looks to defend his featherweight belt against bitter rival Patricio Pitbull. Also on the card, WWE superstar Bobby Lashley returns to the cage, along with knockout artists Cheick Kongo and King Mo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Plymouth, Missouri with the Light Heavyweight World Title on the line as Champ Emanuel Newton takes on journeyman Joey Beltran.

programme.title: Bellator 125: Manhoef vs Marshall
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Fresno, California with a showdown between middleweight knockout artists Doug Marshall and Melvin Manhoef. Also in action is submission ace Goiti Yamauchi, Javy Ayala, and Rafael Carvalho.

programme.title: Bellator 131: Ortiz vs. Bonnar
programme.desc: The talking is over. Bonnar. Ortiz. Time to fight.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pat & Gheorghe say ex-Marine son Rich battles drugs & alcohol despite rehabs & sober houses the past 16 years. It's been 3 years since the family has seen Rich--don't miss an emotional reunion. Plus, hear what Rich admits happened the night before taping.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Connie wrote Dr. Phil for help, concerned for her grandchildren. Jennifer's daughter drank bleach from her sippy cup when she was 3 and was found with a backpack of maggots, mold and rotten milk at 7. Dr. Phil delves into Jennifer's history as a parent.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Aja says she is tired of caring for her entitled, drug-addicted mother, Janet, by allowing her to live with her for 8 of 10 years of her own marriage. Aja cites costs of $100,000. Janet rejects: she pays rent & regularly goes to Narcotics Anonymous.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Stephanie was an aspiring songwriter who loved taking care of kids. Diana was a preschool teacher with a bright future. Neither of these women knew they could end up addicted to drugs.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil turns up the heat on the fireman who slept with his teenage nanny, and delves deeper into the affair that shattered the lives of a husband and wife, and her best friend and parents. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil examines the case of missing mother of two, Susan Powell. Her husband, Josh Powell, is now a person of interest, and Susan's parents, Charles and Judy Cox, are looking for answers. Go behind the headlines of this heartbreaking story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Don't miss Dr. Phil receiving his star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame! Plus, time is of the essence for mom Cindy. Daughter Cheyenne, 24, is a college student, Cindy's caretaker & sole financial supporter. Boyfriend, Blake, calls Cheyenne 'Cinderella'.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bleach, Keys, Bologna": all used as retaliation weapons. Dr. Phil, criminal atty Anthony Pope, & revenge expert Dr. Gina Barreca discuss--such as use of superglue on a man's private parts & also, Michael Brewer, 15, badly burned over a stolen bike. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his interview with Heather & Brian, feuding parents over 15-yr-old son Brandon's death. Hear from Brandon's friends, the last to see him alive and two of the young men make shocking allegations against Heather. How does she respond?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: McKinley, 18, says she decided 5 years ago she never wanted to see her dad, Cory, again, after learning he went to jail on two counts of sexual battery of a minor! She says her dad is a violent, dangerous, "psychopath". Cory says he's never abused anyone.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed "fat guy" Eric was 560 lbs, so he decided to go on an epic bike ride across America. His goals were to lose weight, write a book & repair his relationship with his wife. His story went viral, as critics said Eric was scamming America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Christi says she was an Emmy-winning TV news reporter at the top of her career, but now her struggle with alcohol has left her jobless, homeless and estranged from her two adult daughters. Christi faces her girls for the first time in more than two years.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melissa says Destoni, 14, is an aggressive, violent bully. She's chased her sister with a butcher knife, yells at teachers in the hallways but Destoni crossed a line when she threatened to shoot her teacher and other students, causing suspension. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pam says her ex-husband, Ed, is enabling, Andee's, 24, addiction by giving her money, which she uses for drugs. Ed admits he allows Andee to manipulate him but says he's afraid she'll resort to prostitution or worse. Can Ed learn to change his approach?

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: David Duchovny talks about his career and upcoming rom-com with Drew. Kirby Howell-Baptiste joins Drew and Ross for Drew's News, discussing dating and British foods.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's an all-new Drewber, when actress and entrepreneur Cameron Diaz joins Drew in her minivan to chat while cruising around NYC. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes is sharing her delicious makeover recipe for one of the most common fridge leftovers, rice!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, in all new Drew Crime, Drew meets mixed martial artist Ro Malabanan.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Hey Dude the 90's Called" podcast host and actress Christine Taylor is joining Drew to chat about working together on "The Wedding Singer" and some of her iconic roles in classics like "Dodgeball" and "The Brady Bunch Movie.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics. Stephanie Izard is joining Drew in the kitchen to make something delicious. Eve Rodsky is sharing home equity tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Long Island Medium" star Theresa Caputo is chatting with Drew about her work as a medium, the show and more. She's also doing a special reading of the studio audience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Rob Riggle joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover topics like the news of a potential "Dumb and Dumber 3" and the couple that opted for mashed potato powder instead of rice at their wedding.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Paris in Love" star Paris Hilton joins Drew to chat. Then, CBS News Anchor Michelle Miller is helping Drew and Ross hit the headlines at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bros" star and co-producer Guy Branum joins Drew and Ross at the new's desk. Plus, "Bros" stars Billy Eichner and Luke Macfarlane stop by to chat and play a rousing game of Never Have I Ever with a twist.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Mindy Kaling talks holiday prep with kids, shares behind-the-scenes stories from "The Office" and "Oceans 8" and more. Drew & Ross Mathews cover snooze button science, dating ghosting debate, and saving a NY deli on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross are joined by "She-Hulk" star Jameela Jamil at the news desk. Then, it's an all-new Mom's Time Out: Vegas Edition, where Drew surprises deserving moms with a night out at the Magic Mike Live show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Camilla Cabello opens-up about dating, what she's looking for in her next partner, working with relationship goals couple Gwen Stefani and Blake Shelton on "The Voice" and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Pilar Valdes and Drew share money-saving holiday meal. Drew & Ross Mathews talk empowering single moms, Greta Gerwig's thoughts on a movie, and feature Drew-crime segment with two great grandmas stopping a purse snatcher. (200)

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Equalizer" star Queen Latifah stops by to chat. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, In A Minute Ross is sharing an all new delicious Rossipe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Comedian Celeste Barber, known for her hilarious celebrity parodies, joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover the latest headlines including the one perk employees most wish their employer would offer and share Rihanna's latest collab.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, Drew helps the bridesmaid who went viral for accidentally eating a special cake for the bride and groom make her wedding wrong right.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: A League of Their Own" star Abbi Jacobson opens up about her recent engagement, her bestie Ilana Glazer, what it was like co-creating, writing, producing and starring in "A League of Their Own" and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Martha Stewart stops by to whip up brioche and apple bread pudding, dishes on her thirst traps, the one person she's desperate to meet and shares why she has decided to open-up her Bedford home and gardens in her new shows.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Idris Elba and his wife Sabrina Elba join Drew for a lively conversation while cruising around New York City in her minivan, which Drew likes to call her "Drewber.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ralph Macchio opens up to Drew about his new memoir, "Waxing On: The Karate Kid and Me." Plus, Dennis Rodman joins Drew and Ross Mathews at thew news desk to help serve the news sunny-side up!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by her friend "Shazam! Fury of the Gods" star Lucy Liu and she's dishing on some of her iconic roles like "Charlie's Angels" and "Kill Bill.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News covering everything from rumors of the next actor cast as James Bond as being someone in their 30s.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: At Midnight" star Whitney Cummings is joining Drew to take a bungee fitness class! She's also covering the news with Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk including why women may smell different after leaving a boyfriend's place.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bobby Moynihan tackles the latest headlines including why 69% of Americans are feeling overwhelmed by their TV & movie watch list, what your dreams are trying to tell you, how which emoji you use can affect your desirability when flirting and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's Drew's birthday and we're celebrating all show long with some special surprises for her! "You" star Penn Badgley is surprising Drew with a special birthday present and telling her all about the new season of his hit show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plus, in an all-new Cookbook Club Molly Yeh joins Drew in the kitchen to whip up a yummy and comforting dish from her new cookbook, "Home is Where the Eggs Are.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Queen Latifah shares behind-the-scenes stories. Chris Appleton does music teacher's hair. Drew's News w/ Ross Mathews & Mikel Welch. TikToker Sarah T. shows hack for lamp cords.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to sophisticate Emaline, but she has bigger plans for blackmailing Mr. Drysdale with her cuckoo clock camera. The colonel continues to woo Granny. The two swindlers though haven't met someone as sharp as Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is chopping wood while a chimpanzee named May Bell watches. He wishes that he could teach May Bell to chop wood. When Elly May comes by, she and Jethro talk and decide that they want a gorilla.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts miss Herbie and ask Mr. Drysdale to get the tame gorilla back. The banker promises to help, but actually hinders the effort.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's soap making sends noxious smoke into the air, which gets the attention of smog commissioner Tinsley. He shuts down the operation, and Jed decides to run against him when he misunderstands Mr. Drysdale's advice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed takes a job on the board of directors of O.K. Oil Company.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is so desperate to meet a woman that when Miss Hathaway's bird watching group arrives, he goes out of his way to try to impress the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: In order to buy Mrs. Drysdale a special Christmas present, the Clampetts take seasonal jobs in a department store.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny discovers Martians next door at the Drysdale mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny decides to take her share of the Clampett millions and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide to donate the burden of their millions to some college students and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny competes against Mrs. Drysdale as artists and tells Jed about her uncle, the barn painter. Jed and Jethro go to an upscale gallery to buy a painting, but are mistaken for gardeners. Bessie the chimp dabbles with a paintbrush.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Prepare to be roasted. Zingbot is back! Plus, with the power of veto on the line, will one of the nominees be saved from the block?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: It's double eviction night! Who will be sent to jury?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: BB Comics Week continues as a new HOH is crowned. And who will be the first member of the cookout to be targeted?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: BB Comics are back! Which houseguest hero will soar to capture the Golden Power of Veto? Will the power be used to save one of the nominees?

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: A new head of household will be crowned and secure their spot into the top 3! Which two nominees will find themselves up for eviction?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: With only one week left, our final four houseguests battle it out for the most important veto of the season? Who will win this power to determine who stays and who goes?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will nominations for eviction change, forcing final alliances to be tested? Who will be evicted and who will make it to the final three?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The top three houseguests are surprised with messages from home. Plus witness never before seen laughs, emotions, and drama from this historic season!

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: This is the last stop before finale night. Who will advance and be one step closer to taking the grand prize?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The finale. Season 23 comes to an end and one Houseguest is voted the winner of Big Brother and the grand prize of $750,000.

programme.desc: Tom discovers that his biggest competition for a giant promotion is himself, but finds strength hiding in a short, unexpected person.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and the crew are flying high on the new renovations, but when it's time to say "Bon voyage" to Dutchess, Ceaser begins having second thoughts about his former flame. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser takes Sky's advice to heart and decides to take a little trip across the globe to surprise Dutchess. While Ceaser and Dutchess spend time together in Paris, Quani tries to come to terms with her feelings about her husband, Puma. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and Dutchess have returned from Paris as a couple and the crew wonders what this means for the future of the shop. Quani tells Puma that she wants a career and is pissed when Puma laughs it off. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and Dutchess finally show up at the shop and Donna and Ceaser go at it. Walt reunites with his long lost family and O'S**t, still in rehab, receives frightening news. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: With Anya in the hospital, O'S**t tries to fix his relationship. Sassy decides to introduce her new girlfriend to the crew. Meanwhile, Ceaser, Dutchess, & Ted go to Arizona to bring Sky home but find out Sky's facing 8 years in jail. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ted's true feelings come to light upon Sky's 2-month sentence to Tent City, one of the most controversial jails in the world. Puma's business partner, Med, plays mediator trying to squash the beef and bring the old friends back together. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Quani and Puma are officially "turned up", causing them to miss the Black Ink photo shoot. O'S**t heads to court to find out the outcome of his gun charge. Quani curses out Ceaser, causing a full-blown riot on the streets of Harlem. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The pressure is on for Ceaser when Dutchess' parents arrive for their engagement party. Quani and Puma make it clear that this war isn't over. Sky struggles with the emotions she feels over leaving Tent City. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky is freed from Tent City andTed is waiting outside for her. When Kathie has DNA results in hand, O'Sh*t deals with his past. Puma creates a plan to protect his family but results in a full-out brawl on the streets of New York City. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of the fashion show incident, the crew works on rebuilding and proving that they are stronger than ever before. When Sassy shows up, Ceaser makes it clear that anyone associated with Puma is not allowed on his turf. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: When Donna speaks her mind one too many times for Ceaser's liking, he sends her packing. A customer appreciation (aka mixxxy) field trip to a water park ends in fireworks when Sky finds out that Ted has been messing around. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of Puma's devastating loss of Ink 124, Ceaser meets with Med, who gives him the offer of a lifetime. Now, Ceaser finds himself torn between his inevitable and dreaded move to North Carolina, and the chance to run Harlem. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser finds himself looking for a house in North Carolina. Daddy Rick fires up the grill for some good old Southern hospitality, and for Ceaser, the pressure is on. Back in Harlem, Sky checks in with Puma and tells him to man up. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Steve Austin brings back 12 seasoned Redneck Island veterans and 12 eager new rookies to battle it out for $100,000. At the first challenge, the players dive into the competition as they fight it out to claim victory.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The game is turned on its head as one player quits the competition and another is seriously injured. The challenge turns physical as the teams fight to stay afloat.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The players must rise to the occasion as a daunting challenge pushes their limits to new heights. One of the veterans gets life-changing news from home. A powerful new alliance forms that changes the course of the game.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A budding romance between two teammates complicates their future in the game. The challenge forces the competitors to put their brains as well as their brawn to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The power continues to shift in the game, raising the stakes to a new high as the teams brawl it out at the challenge. Old romantic flames reignite between Margaret and Josh.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rival alliances divide the house as a new power-team emerges. The players have a tough time choking down what Steve is serving up at the challenge. Two best friends face off against each other in an emotional Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The teams hang on for dear life as they fight for victory at the challenge. A wild night of fun leads to chaos when the party gets out of hand. A tough Pit decision threatens to tear friendships apart.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With the end and the money in sight, tensions are high and friendships are tested as the competitors' plot to stay in the game. It's a hard day on the lake as the teams struggle to pull off a crucial win.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With the finale just one challenge away, it's down to the wire and one small misstep may cost a team a shot at $100,000. Emotions are high as it all comes down to the last Pit. The final three teams are revealed.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The end has arrived and the strongest have survived. With everything on the line, the final three teams must push themselves harder than ever before as they compete in an epic final race.

programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A repeat offender takes the police on a bumpy ride, a deputy finds paraphernalia in a teen's car, and a woman learns of her brother's drug habit during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect’s story. A deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: A suspect tries to ditch his stash in a laundromat, a nervous driver arouses suspicion, and a woman returning home from a night out finds her boyfriend has changed the locks.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night that are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Jesús, como transeúnte, y Yadiel, como conductor, tienen un accidente en un paso peatonal. Además, Alessandra está deprimida y su terapeuta le recomienda tener un amante.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: La hija de Camila es menor de edad, pero está enamorada de un hombre de 30 años. También, al hijo de Juan y Carolina le hacen una oferta para jugar en el Milán Fútbol Club, pero está lesionado.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Ana quiere tener relaciones sexuales con su esposo Juan, pero este se niega porque teme por la salud de ella. Además, Maxula le entregó su hijo a Anahis pero le devolvieron otro.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Charlie es enfermero de pacientes terminales y decide cumplirles el último deseo, pero algo sale mal. Lisa sube un video a las redes y lo monetiza, Katty quiere ganancias y que baje el video.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Luis y Jéssica fue a una excursión al Amazonas y sufrió un accidente mortal. Además, Josefina es un travesti que fue violado en la prisión de mujeres y en la de hombres.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Camilo no puede convivir con las obsesiones y los celos de Diana, ella ha llegado a la violencia. Karla es anoréxica, pesa 70 libras, todo por la obsesión de su madre por convertirla en modelo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: A Carlos le queda un año de vida y lo quiere pasar tranquilo, pero vive con un gótico sadomasoquista. Andrea quiere la custodia de su hermano para protegerlo de su padre maltratador.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Daniela acordó tener sexo con dos chicos con la condición de que se pusieran condón, pero ellos no cumplieron. Jonathan perdió el puente de dientes postizos en una clase de buceo y exige pago.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Carlos grabó a una pareja mientras tenía sexo y subió el video a las redes, lo que captó era una violación. Oscar se queda dormido en un bote, su esposa y su amigo aprovechan para tener sexo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Le dio permiso a una amiga para salir con su hijo de 15 años, ella lo violó. También, Pedro es alérgico a la radiación electromagnética del WiFi, por eso usa un inhibidor.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Drunk History

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Wayne Wheeler becomes the face of Prohibition, Dorothy Fuldheim breaks barriers in news broadcasting, and Muhammad Ali refuses to fight in the Vietnam War. Featuring Gaius Charles, Samm Levine, Mary Elizabeth Ellis, George Wallace and Ron Funches.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Vigilantes led by Andres Pico enact street justice, Rin Tin Tin becomes the world's biggest movie star, and the construction of the L.A. aqueduct brings riches to city officials. Featuring Jack Black, Kyle Gass, Ryan Phillippe and Giancarlo Esposito.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Nellie Bly and Elizabeth Bisland try to travel around the world in under 80 days, and Thomas Nast's political cartoons lead to the downfall of Tammany Hall leader "Boss" Tweed. Featuring Michael Cera, Ellie Kemper, Natasha Leggero and Jason Alexander.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Kentucky Daisy stakes a claim to land, Gordon Cooper overcomes mechanical issues on a one-man space mission, and African-American Deputy Marshal Bass Reeves is the inspiration for the Lone Ranger. Featuring Kat Dennings, Colin Hanks and Jaleel White.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: After taking 5 DNA tests, Rebecca is back with 2 more men to find the father of her new baby! Then, Don and his wife were happy to find out that their son didn’t father Jessica’s baby, but they’re back because she thinks Don is the dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: It's more stories of paternity mysteries, mad moms and denying dads. These women are desperate for the paternity search to end. But after the results are revealed, will they be jumping for joy? Or will they have to start their search all over again?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki’s boyfriend Tavon is a cheater. What will they say when he is caught on our hidden camera? Then, are James’ kids with Nikkie actually his?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Da'Shan is here with his new girl Tyrekia to prove that he's not the father of Ashley's baby! Ashley is 1000% positive that Da'Shan is the father and is here to prove it once and for all. But what will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: It’s a Spring Wild Safari Spectacular on today’s MAURY! Jungle Jack Hanna joins Maury to share some of the most amazing animals we’ve ever seen! Your whole family will want to tune in to watch this amazing episode of MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Man Sleeping With My Teen Nephew?
programme.desc: Paul confesses 3 secrets to his girlfriend Alycia.Is Brandi's husband is still having sex with Ashley after their threesome? Plus, Tim’s fidelity status could ruin his chances of marrying Laurie!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Toni, Quintin, and his mom return to find out who fathered his son. This time they’ll wonder if Toni cheated! Jenny needs to know whether her husband Matt or his friend fathered her child! Finally, will Vivian end her 30-year search for her son?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Imagine finding out that the person you've been sharing your life with has been keeping a secret. MAURY's guests say they need to tell the truth – and some of them confess to more than cheating!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kisha wants to know why she found her sister Kim and her husband Shannon in bed together watching The Maury Show. She also found a photo of Shannon on Kim's phone! Then, Joe's wife Melissa caught him sending a racy photo to her best friend Brandy!

programme.title: The Maury Show: My Wife Had a Threesome. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Keith is terrified that Chyna cheated and their daughter may not be his. Could Keith’s best friend be the real father? Will the DNA results quash Omar's denials about fathering Jennifer’s child?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, Don and Amy are back for another lie detector test! This time Don wants to know if Amy is sleeping with his brother! Will they ace their tests?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: 19-year-old Raven is a future bride in a few weeks, but suspects that Robert has been cheating. Then, Jeff fears his fiancée Kristen is having sex with someone else…his uncle JB!

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Men Tested … Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Tony cheated on his wife Tiff and impregnated another woman. Now he’s denying both of their kids! Plus, more shocking tales of mad moms, denying dads and DNA drama!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Rhonda is positive that John is the father of her child. Even John’s mother agrees with her! Then, Kim and Heather used to be best friends. But that was before Rick left her for Heather. But Kim is sure that Rick fathered her baby. What is the truth?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Tiara wants De'Ron to admit that he fathered her baby! He claims the proof lies in fingers: his fiancée Diamond's baby has two pinky fingers like him, but Tiara's baby doesn't! Later, did Michelle have a baby with Mitchell's brother-in-law Shane?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Top Ten Shocking Family Feuds
programme.desc: We’re counting down the top ten most unbelievable moments of family faceoffs! Plus we’ll let you know what happened to some of these guests after they left our show and returned to their lives.

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: Bruce says he thought he purchased a real taxidermy sail fish but says Michael fooled him into buying a plastic toy.

programme.desc: Gonul se crio en un orfanato, pero usa su disciplina y determinación para convertirse en una exitosa enfermera quirúrgica. Conoce a un famoso y atractivo neurocirujano llamado Tekin en el hospital, quien se enamora de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
